concepts_used.title: K-Means 聚类
concepts_used.how_used: 论文使用聚类分析将参赛者分为6组，基于上一年的比赛数据提取均值和标准差作为分类依据，将水平相近的运动员分在同一组。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: We apply Cluster Analysis to divide all the participants into 6 groups, combining several original groupings and let the athletes at the similar level to be on the same group

concepts_used.title: 遗传算法
concepts_used.how_used: 论文使用遗传算法优化每个组的出发顺序和具体出发时间，以总时间最小为目标，并确保组间不相互干扰、无道路拥堵。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: In model 2, we apply the Genetic Algorithm to optimize the starting order and exact starting time of every group.

concepts_used.title: 线性规划建模
concepts_used.how_used: 论文使用线性规划模型，在模型2得到的最优出发顺序基础上，考虑比赛距离对道路拥堵和总时间的影响，以最小化等待时间为目标，并加入距离约束。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: In model 3, we apply linear programming. ... this paper assumes the constricted condition of race distances and finally derives the linear programming model.

concepts_used.title: 中心化/归一化/标准化
concepts_used.how_used: 论文假设每个组运动员的水平服从正态分布，并提取均值和标准差作为分类依据。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: Assume the level of every group of athletes is in normal distribution. The two key parameters in the model are expected value μ (mean), and sigma σ.

concepts_used.title: 灵敏度分析
concepts_used.how_used: 论文在模型3中使用变量控制法（控制变量法）分析比赛距离对道路拥堵和总时间的影响。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: First, we use variable-controlling method, under the result of optimum starting sequence of athletes derived in model 2; we consider the influence that distances of races will exert on road congestion and total competition time.

concepts_used.title: 模型假设的写法
concepts_used.how_used: 论文列出了5条基本假设，包括水平相近的运动员互不干扰、无意外事故、无额外等待时间、匀速运动、速度不因距离改变。
concepts_used.source_excerpt:
II. Basic Assumptions
1. The athletes at the similar level will not disturb each other.
2. There is no accident happening in the competition that forces the competition to end.
3. Every group will not have extra waiting time besides the converting time after setting off.
4. The athletes do uniform motion in every competition.
5. The velocity of athletes for every races will not change due to the change of distance set for race.

concepts_used.title: 论文整体结构（IMRaD 格式）
concepts_used.how_used: 论文采用IMRaD结构：摘要、引言、假设、模型（模型1聚类、模型2遗传算法、模型3线性规划）、结论、优缺点、参考文献、附录。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: I. Introduction ... II. Basic Assumptions ... IV. Model 1 ... V. Model 2 ... VI. Model 3 ... VII. Conclusions ... VIII. Strengths and weaknesses ... References: ... Appendix ...
